prerequisites: A CommCare HQ account with access to the project space (domain) whose data you want to replicate.
An API key generated for your CommCare HQ account, used for the required api_key field. Generate it at https://www.commcarehq.org/account/api_keys/; the key value is shown only once at creation time.
The Application ID (app_id) of the CommCare application you want to replicate. Both api_key and app_id are required and are treated as secrets.
The project space / domain name (project_space) used in CommCare API URLs of the form /a/<domain>/api/...; this field is optional in the connector configuration.
A start_date defining the earliest point from which records are replicated (required).

authMethods.name: API key authentication (api_key)
authMethods.summary: CommCare HQ's method for programmatic API access, mapped to the connector's required api_key secret. CommCare expects the credential in an HTTP header of the form 'Authorization: ApiKey [USERNAME]:[API_KEY]'. API keys are generated and managed at https://www.commcarehq.org/account/api_keys/, and the key value is displayed only once when created.

setupSteps.title: Generate a CommCare API key
setupSteps.body: Sign in to CommCare HQ and open the API keys page at https://www.commcarehq.org/account/api_keys/. Create a new API key and copy the key value immediately, because CommCare shows it only once. Use this value for the connector's required api_key field.

setupSteps.title: Identify your Application ID and project space
setupSteps.body: In CommCare HQ, locate the Application ID (app_id) of the application you want to replicate and note your project space (domain), which appears in CommCare API URLs of the form https://www.commcarehq.org/a/<domain>/api/.... Supply app_id as the required Application ID and, if needed, set project_space to your domain.

setupSteps.title: Set the replication start date
setupSteps.body: Set the required start_date to the earliest date from which records should be replicated.

setupSteps.title: Enter credentials and configure the source
setupSteps.body: Provide the required api_key and app_id (both secret), the required start_date, and optionally project_space, then save the connector configuration. The connector authenticates to the CommCare HQ API using the API key.

sources.title: CommCare API Overview (authentication, API key generation, Authorization header)
Airbyte CommCare source connector setup (required api_key, app_id, project_space, start_date)
